name: Eton Mess
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp orange liqueur (e.g., Cointreau or Grand Marnier)
75 g Meringue Super Stars or Meringue Nests -- crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly whip the cream until it forms soft peaks.
2. Gently fold in the orange liqueur to the whipped cream.
3. Stir in the chopped strawberries and crumbled meringue until combined.
4. Spoon the mixture into individual serving glasses or a large bowl.
5. Serve immediately.
